title: Pattern Runner (Game Commitment)
description: SHA-256 commitment of rhythm streak actions, score, and wallet. Generated by completing the mini game.
method: sha256(JSON.stringify({wallet, gameId, level, score, actionHash, salt}))

sampleData.commitment: sha256 of full game state + salt (32 bytes)

verification: Recompute sha256 from wallet + game state + salt and compare to stored commitment.
note: Sample format. Real commitments are generated client-side by completing the Pattern Runner mini game.
